default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the new content strategy and define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Pivot to a deep-dive content strategy, starting with "trades" verticals (General Contracting, HVAC) to address flat traffic caused by zero-click AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Reporting Challenge:** Approvals are hard to track to specific pages, making it difficult to prove content ROI. The immediate goal is to find early signals of success.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [**Data Access:** GrowthX needs GA4 access for a technical expert to build custom reports and a list of top-performing pages by approvals to improve internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Execution Plan:** GrowthX will create persona docs and separate content pipelines for each vertical, using 1–2 calibration articles to ensure quality before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Flat Traffic & Unclear ROI

  - [**Cause:** \~85% of content is top-of-funnel (ToFu), which now appears in Google's zero-click AI Overviews, causing flat organic traffic despite rising AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Approvals are hard to track to specific pages, obscuring content ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Goal:** Find early signals of success (e.g., traffic growth, citations) to prove the new strategy is working before approvals can be attributed.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

### Solution: Deep-Dive Vertical Strategy

  - [**Approach:** Pivot from broad ToFu content to deep dives within specific verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:** General Contracting and HVAC.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [**Flexibility:** The plan may shift to a different vertical (e.g., e-commerce) after 2–3 months.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Reporting:** Each vertical will be treated as a cohort to track performance over time.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Execution & Reporting Plan

  - [**Content Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [GrowthX will create persona docs and separate content pipelines for each vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [1–2 calibration articles per vertical will ensure quality before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Reporting Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**GA4:** GrowthX needs access for a technical expert to build custom reports tracking organic touchpoints before conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**Check That:** This tool will replace Scrunch for AI visibility reporting. GrowthX will audit prompts to ensure comprehensive tracking for the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [**Looker:** A new view will be built to highlight top "movers and shakers" (pages with significant week-over-week growth).](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Internal Linking:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [GrowthX is building a new artifact to improve LLM-driven internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
      - [**Dependency:** A list of top-performing pages by approvals is needed to inform this artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dave:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Send availability to Bailey for a meeting with Jen and Panzer (editorial team) to discuss quality concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
      - [Provide the final, prioritized list of verticals to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Provide the list of top-performing pages by approvals to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [Get the email for the technical SEO expert who needs GA4 access.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Audit Check That prompts for the new strategy and share the spreadsheet with Dave's team.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Build the new Looker view for top "movers and shakers."](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [Create Airtable content plans for the initial verticals once the list is finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [**Bethany & Dave:**](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
      - [Define and share early success metrics for the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/BYWbEQ2dBU_ztXAE3sXU5siWbyg-p8yj?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

action_items.description: Send availability next week to Bailey for meeting w/ Jen & Panzer
Email Bethany/Dave for GA4 access for GrowthX SEO expert; then set up custom GA4 views
Audit Check That prompts for Home Services; share spreadsheet w/ Dave/Bethany
Build Looker page for week-over-week page movers
Confirm first 2 verticals to Bailey; then Bailey builds Airtable plan and creates persona docs
Discuss w/ editorial: separate pipelines per vertical; plan 1–2 calibration articles
Define and share early-signal metrics w/ Bailey
Read strategy doc; post questions in Slack to Dave/Bethany
